# Packrift Catalog Trust Ledger

> A public evidence ledger for approved in-stock Packrift catalog records, showing product links, source hashes, catalog-control status, dimension status, image status, merchant availability, and public-safe trust bands.

Site: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/
Generated: 2026-06-01T22:15:13Z
Source: Packrift catalog-control snapshot filtered to public-safe approved in-stock rows.

## Public files
- Sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/robots.txt
- JSON: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/data/trust-ledger.json
- JSONL: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/data/trust-ledger.jsonl
- CSV: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/data/trust-ledger.csv
- Stats: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/data/stats.json
- OpenAPI: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/openapi.json
- Agent Manifest: https://packrift.github.io/catalog-trust-ledger/agent-manifest.json

## Boundary
This ledger excludes supplier cost, private margin math, customer records, cart data, order history, freight quotes, credentials, and checkout promises. Packrift.com remains the buying source of truth.
